title: 2 Oslo - 1 Flam - 2 Bergen - 2 Stavanger

day_descriptions.Day 1: Arrive Oslo. Evening at leisure along the Aker Brygge waterfront.
day_descriptions.Day 2: Oslo city tour — Viking Ship Museum, Fram Museum, Vigeland Sculpture Park.
day_descriptions.Day 3: Train to Myrdal then the Flåm Railway to the Aurlandsfjord. Overnight Flåm.
day_descriptions.Day 4: Fjord cruise Flåm to Bergen through the Nærøyfjord. Arrive Bergen, explore Bryggen wharf.
day_descriptions.Day 5: Bergen at leisure — Fløibanen funicular, fish market, old quarter.
day_descriptions.Day 6: Ferry or flight to Stavanger. Norway's oil capital has a charming old town of wooden houses and the Stavanger Cathedral.
day_descriptions.Day 7: Preikestolen (Pulpit Rock) — a 604-metre flat-topped cliff above the Lysefjord, one of Norway's iconic hikes. Optional boat tour of the Lysefjord.

description: Oslo, the Flåm Railway, Bergen and Stavanger's oil history and Preikestolen cliff on a seven-night Norway circuit.
